tasks.label: CTOA: Validate Pack
tasks.command: echo CTOA AI Toolkit pack is configured

tasks.label: CTOA: Launch Pack
tasks.command: echo Launching CTOA pack...; if (Test-Path .\agents\ctoa-agents.yaml) { echo Agents OK } else { echo Agents missing; exit 1 }; if (Test-Path .\prompts\braver-library.yaml) { echo Prompts OK } else { echo Prompts missing; exit 1 }; if (Test-Path .\.github\workflows\ctoa-pipeline.yml) { echo CI Workflow OK } else { echo CI Workflow missing; exit 1 }; echo Launch dry-run PASS
